Petition For Authority To Pay Litigation Counsel Fees And For Discharge
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Fpr Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Dec-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Edward A. Koplowitz and Judy H. Chen appearing for Dana Kane, trustee. Robert Roddick appearing for and with Gregory Tripousis. With all the parties in agreement, the Court approved the settlement agreement. Mr. Roddick stated on the record that he withdrew his 21320 petition. Court granted the petition for instructions. Court signed both orders in open court.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR# 5229. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Cruz.

Application For Determination That Petition To Invalidate Memorandum Re: Separate Property, To Assert Community Property Rights, Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Continued To Oct-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Ed Kaplowitz appeared for Dana Kane (Trustee). Robert Roddick appeared on his own behalf and for and with Gregory Tripousis.

Mr. Roddick informed the Court that Mr. Tripousis fired him and Mr. Sprague two weeks ago, but that no Substitution of Attorney had been filed. Mr. Roddick was informed by new counsel that he would not be taking the case. Mr. Kaplowitz expressed frustration and requested that the matter go to mediation. Mr. Tripousis responded yes, when the Court asked him if Mr. Roddick and Mr. Sprague were his attorneys. The Court stated that Mr. Tripousis needed to be represented by Counsel. Mr. Roddick stated that he is prepared to proceed, but that he needed one week. The Court continued both matters to October 24, 2007. All parties are to be present.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Patrick Heard CSR#11055. Bailiff: O. Arias. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Continued To Oct-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Application For Determination That Petition To Invalidate Memorandum Re: Separate Property, To Assert Community Property Rights, Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Continued To Oct-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Edward Kaplowitz appeared for Successor Trustee. Robert Sprague appeared on his own behalf. Gregory Tripousis appeared in Pro Per.

Mr. Sprague informed the Court that Mr. Tripousis had terminated his services as well as Mr. Roddick's, but that no Substitution of Attorney had been filed. He asked the Court if he could be removed as Attorney of record. Mr. Kaplowitz expressed annoyance stating that he attempted twice to resolve this matter and that he does not want to deal with Mr. Tripousis in a Pro Per capacity. He also requested that he be paid Attorneys fees for continual services. The Court granted Mr Kaplowitz request. He will bring an order regarding fees to the next hearing. Mr. Tripousis was informed that a Substitution for Attorney should be on file by then. The Court denied Mr. Sprague's request and continued the matter to October 17, 2007 so that Mr. Tripousis could obtain counsel. Mr. Sprague is to notify Mr. Murphy.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Laura Martinez CSR#11332. Bailiff: Rich Lee. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
